critters.name: Crocodiles
critters.likedFood: Fish and Seafood from Glade of Trust
critters.feeding: Red Light, Green Light: Stop when they have their heads up. Go when they have their heads down. Repeat until they lay on their bellies. Approach them carefully to start the game.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard (2) Memory Shard Motif Bag
critters.likedReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Cucumber Seed (1-2)

critters.name: Foxes
critters.likedFood: Fish and Seafood from Frosted Heights
critters.feeding: Tag: When you have caught their attention, chase after them until they stop.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard (2) Memory Shard Motif Bag
critters.likedReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Iron Ingot

critters.name: Rabbits
critters.likedFood: Grains Spices & Herbs * Vegetables * Fruit grown from seeds , i.e. Melon , Cosmic Figs , Grapes , Pineapple
critters.feeding: Tag: When you have caught their attention, chase after them until they stop.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Motif Bag
critters.likedReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Lettuce Seed (4)

critters.name: Raccoons
critters.feeding: Red Light, Green Light: Watch their body language, and approach when they are relaxed. When they are alert, with their head up, remain still - otherwise, the Critter will move to a new location.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Motif Bag

critters.name: Ravens
critters.feeding: Patience: Wait until they have finished circling your head.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard (3) Memory Shard Motif Bag
critters.likedReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Gold Ingot

critters.name: Sea Turtles
critters.feeding: Patience: Wait until they are ready to come out of their shells. You can also drop food, like seaweed, in front of them and they will come out immediately.
critters.favReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Motif Bag

critters.name: Squirrels
critters.likedFood: Fruit foraged from Bushes and Trees
critters.feeding: Squirrels play no games. Simply approach and be ready to feed them!
critters.favReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Motif Bag

critters.name: Emerald Sunbird
critters.feeding: Sunbirds play no games. Simply approach and be ready to feed them!
critters.favReward: Dream Shard (2) Memory Shard Motif Bag
critters.likedReward: Dream Shard Memory Shard Cocoa Bean (4) Cherry (3) Crystal (2)

critters.favReward: Dream Shard (2) Memory Shard Motif Bag
